Chapter 57

Why is Gu Bai smelling like brave all ov
Mr. Si was like a real old father who couldn’t bear to tell his children that
“Santa Claus is fake”, he couldn’t bear to tell Gu Bai Jade that he had eaten
him.
Because Gu Bai seemed to value that set of emeralds.
In fact, it is easy to understand, Si Yiming thought, after all, this set of jade
is strictly speaking, it is the first painting sold by Gu Bai Zhenger’s Eight
Classics in the exhibition.
It was also the first time that Gu Bai participated in a formal exhibition. It
was of great significance and very expensive. Gu Bai regarded that set of
jewelry as a treasure. It was completely normal.
Even if it is their sacred beast, they are very impressed with the object of
the first fight in this life and the fight they won for the first time, and they
are still fresh in their memories after thousands of years.
Si Yiming felt that if he told Gu Bai honestly, this little cub might cry on the
spot.
But the set of imperial green sent by the old jade is not ordinary imperial
green.
That was the jade with spirituality that the old jade separated from himself
in order to show his sincerity.
This jade has no spiritual wisdom, but it has extremely rich aura, and its
surface is also extremely beautiful, even in the emperor green, it is
considered the best appearance.
But something with aura, staying next to a young kid in the growth period,
basically will be cold within a few days.
The set of jade jewelry was actually absorbed by Gu Bai before he left, but
it was only then discovered by Gu Bai.
Si Yiming communicated with Lao Jade and expressed that he wanted a set
of emperor green jewellery with the same style as Gu Bai.
And, as long as ordinary jade, don’t separate old jade by yourself.
Just kidding, do you divide it into another set and let Gu Bai eat it?
The old jade can’t stand being so tossed.
But cub, still have to be spoiled, anyway, Gu Xiaobai can’t tell whether he
has aura or not.
Mr. Si reached a consensus with Lao Jade, glanced at Gu Bai’s door, and
went back to the house.
Gu Bai returned home with the empty box. He was worried that Jade would
not be able to find home when he ran back, so he carefully placed the box in
its previous position.
There is no doubt that Gu Bai trusted Si Yiming.
Previously, ginseng would also run. Mr. Si and his dad said that ginseng run
is instinct. Some old ginseng will run. In some local folklore, this is true of
ginseng run.
Since the ginseng will run, there seems to be nothing surprising about the
emerald run. Maybe there are some places with such folklore.
After all, he has little knowledge. In fact, the folklore of ginseng meeting
running was only known a while ago.
Gu Bai, who had little knowledge, accepted the setting smoothly and
opened the box so that he could enter the box when the jade came back.
When the jade ran back, Gu Bai was going to find Mr. Si with the box, and
trouble Mr. Si to lock up the jade. Otherwise, if such a precious thing is
knocked on the outside or even picked up by someone, how about it? Not
blood loss.
Gu Bai placed the box, turned his head, left the bedroom, and went to the
second floor.
After knowing the theme of the big exhibition, Gu Bai knew that he had to
paint the sunset picture more quickly.
Submitting the work materials and reviewing it a week in advance, there is
not much time left for Gu Bai. In addition, he has a new team project to
start, and the task is not very easy.
Gu Bai sat in front of the easel, picked up the paint and oil, and drew out
the paintbrush.
Gu Bai is quite satisfied with this compact and fulfilling life.
Human beings always shine because they are always trying to chase time.
Monsters will not work hard like human beings because of the long time
and life.
Gu Bai didn’t have any real feelings about the long life of monsters. He still
worked hard to enrich himself every day according to his previous rhythm.
He immersed himself in drawing and practicing, hoping that he could go
further.
Before touching the ceiling of the painting industry, Gu Bai would not think
about philosophical issues such as the meaning of life and time.
But he has already considered it, and if he really hits the ceiling of this line,
he will turn his head and learn something else.
But it is really difficult to reach the top of this line. After all, there are so
many branches in painting, such as oil painting, watercolor sketch,
sculpture, ink and so on.
Gu Bai felt that it would be impossible for Gu Bai to master the essence and
climb to the top within one or two hundred years.
One or two hundred years later, who knows if there will be any new genres
and new painting techniques in painting art.
No matter how bad, after drawing enough, he can go to play some other
things.
There are three hundred and sixty lines in this world, and each line is worth
studying and struggling for a lifetime. Gu Bai felt that no matter what he
did, he would not end up doing nothing.
——His mentality is always quite optimistic, and he is born with a tenacity
to work hard.
Gu Bai sat on the stool, dipped in white paint, steadily smearing the details
one by one. The layers of the paint were layered, revealing a heavy sense of
light and real layers.
A group of sunset like a fire, and the sea of   clouds soaked by the setting sun
like a fairyland.
The sky in November became gloomy, and the lights in the large studio on
the second floor were turned on, illuminating the studio brightly.
This icy light is quite similar to the training camp that year. When Gu Bai
raised his head, he was in a daze as if he was returning to the training camp
hailed by the art students as a “dark nightmare”.
Most art students were nightmares at that time, but for Gu Bai, who had no
other pursuits other than painting and studying, it was too fulfilling.
Gu Bai was in a daze for two seconds and then came back to his senses. He
stretched his waist and moved his neck, then dipped in paint, and was about
to continue writing, when the doorbell came from the door.
Gu Bai was taken aback, glanced at the clock on the wall, and found that it
was close to dinner time, and quickly got up and went downstairs to open
the door.
It’s almost time for dinner, probably Mr. Si or Mr. Xie are here.
Gu Bai thought, but after opening the door, he was surprised to find that it
was Uncle Yu—the craftsman who made custom picture frames.
Gu Bai looked at the big brother with white hair, and was stunned for two
seconds before suddenly realizing that he could not enter this apartment
complex.
No, I’m afraid it’s not human.
“Uncle Yu.” Gu Bai said hello in a daze, and then when he noticed that the
big brother had responded, he pointed to the side.
Gu Bai took a look and found that the three picture frames standing by the
door were the ones he had selected for the wood this afternoon.
Gu Bai abrió la boca y la volvió a cerrar.
This speed is really not human.
“Why did you deliver it yourself?” Gu Bai quickly let go, “Come in and
rest…”
Uncle Yu shook his head: “No, I brought things here, just to discuss
something with you.”
Gu Bai felt that it was not a problem to discuss at the door, but seeing Uncle
Yu’s appearance, Gu Bai still did not continue to invite, but carefully picked
up the picture frame and moved into the house.
Uncle Yu also spoke: “That’s right, Gu Bai, I want to ask you to help draw
the picture.”
Hearing this request, Gu Bai didn’t hesitate, and nodded, “You said.”
“It doesn’t need to be too complicated, you can just paint me a piece of
land.” Yu Shu sighed, “Although my body does not choose the living
environment, but the evil spirits have become more and more severe
recently, and I can’t bear it.”
Gu Bai moved the picture frame and said, “Can’t you live here?”
Old Yushu shook his head: “There are my roots there, I don’t want to go.”
Gu Bai looked at Uncle Yu’s determined appearance, and stopped to say
more, and immediately nodded: “I will give it to you as soon as possible.”
“Thank you.” There was a smile on Uncle Yu’s face, crowded with
wrinkles, and a simple and precipitation atmosphere, “in the future you
come to my place to set the picture frame, and I will give you free of
charge!”
As soon as Gu Bai wanted to refuse, the old elm tree blew his legs and feet
into the elevator all the way, his vigorous posture did not match the old
attitude on his face.
Gu Bai: "..."
A discount is enough.
Gu Bai sighed softly and entered the door carrying the last frame.
Today neither Mr. Xie nor Mr. Si came. Mr. Si said he was visiting the
human in Unit 9, and Mr. Xie was obsessed with working overtime in the
office.
There was no one to dine with, so Gu Bai simply emptied all the food that
could be eaten directly in the refrigerator, and took a few bites into the
studio when it was empty.
Nibbing the painting reached the point where he usually sleeps, but he
gnawed it out slowly.
Gu Bai felt that he was not too full after eating. It was probably because he
had eaten with Mrs. Spirit Snake’s stomach open for a month. Gu Bai felt
that his appetite had been raised a lot.
When Gu Bai thought of Mrs. Ling Snake, she basically spent eight hours
in the kitchen 24 hours a day, and couldn’t help but deflate her belly.
Hungry, Gu Bai thought.
I don’t have time to paint, so there is so much time to cook for myself.
Before going to bed, I will make preparations for the little dessert that I will
bring to Mr. Si tomorrow morning.
Feeling a little hungry, Gu Bai rubbed his belly, ran to make a few
puddings, put them in the refrigerator, and then drank a glass of milk. After
washing, he was aggrieved and retracted into the quilt.
It’s obviously not poor anymore, why is it more miserable than when it was
poor before.
How come you are so hungry.
Gu Bai sighed, glanced at the empty box on the table, and turned off the
bedside lamp.
Tarde en la noche.
Si Yiming returned from patrolling outside and took a look outside the
window of Gu Bai’s room.
Mr. Si did not visit the comprehension human in Unit 9 today, but ran to
find the old jade.
After Si Yiming made sure that the small drum bag on the bed was slightly
ups and downs and fell asleep, he lifted one of his paws. There were several
emerald green jadeites on the scales. Those jadeites were made into
pendants, earrings and rings. In the night The bottom shows a charming
dark green.
The charming dark greens were carefully held up by Pai Yao one by one,
and then carrying spiritual power, he put the set of jewelry into the box.
After finishing all this, Mr. Si turned away without saying a word, waved
his sleeve to hide his merit and fame.
When Gu Bai woke up the next morning, seeing Jade come back, he put the
lid on the box happily.
After a month, Gu Bai’s daily routine of feeding Si Yiming was staged on
the sixth floor of Unit 6, Shanhaiyuan, Jiuzhou.
Xie Zhi yawned and walked out the door. Just as he was about to stretch
himself in the corridor, he saw Gu Bai holding a box downstairs and Si
Yiming holding a big pudding.
The two were talking about something, their voices were not loud, that is,
their normal size, but they couldn’t hold back Xie Zhi, being a sacred beast
with ears and ears.
Mr. Xie heard Gu Bai say: “I haven’t made desserts for a month. I don’t
know if I have stepped back.”
Si Yiming ate a spoonful slowly, and then said, “Same.”
Gu Bai smiled, holding a beautiful box in his arms.
“Emerald won’t run away again?” He asked.
Si Yiming nodded while eating pudding.
“Thank you, Mr. Si!” Gu Bai heard the words and ran home happily holding
the box.
After listening to the whole process, Mr. Xie glanced at Gu Bai who ran
back to put the box, and found that Gu Bai now smelled like brave all over
his body.
If he hadn’t clearly known that Gu Bai was not Si Yiming’s cub, he would
have thought that Gu Bai was a little brave!
Mr. Xie met the gaze that Mr. Si raised his eyes and slapped his tongue:
“Mr. Si, what’s the matter with Jade not running again?”
Mr. Si put it rightly: “An excuse for fooling little monsters.”
Xie Zhi paused, and then asked, “Then what’s the matter with Gu Bai’s
smell of brave all over?”
Si Yiming thought of the criminal law that Xie Zhi had uncovered before,
and when faced with Xie Zhi, his attitude was not so peaceful and humble.
He sneered, “What’s wrong with the smell of bravery all over? Gu Lang has
no objection.”
Some opinions were also lost by him.
Mr. Secretary is triumphant.
Gracias: "…"
¿y muchos más? !
Xie Zhi looked at Pai Yao in disbelief and closed the door.
With his bag on his back, Gu Bai met Mr. Xie in the elevator who had not
seen him in January.
Mr. Xie looked at him with a look full of guilt and regret, and Gu Bai
couldn’t see any energy.
“Gu Bai.” Xie Zhi softened his voice. “If you need legal aid, I can’t ignore
it.”
Gu Bai was taken aback and hesitated for a moment: “Um…thank you,
thank you?”
Xie Zhi patted him on the shoulder painfully, with a look of unbearable
expression, strode out of the elevator and got into his car.
Gu Bai was carrying his bag, standing in the lightly chilly wind in
November, and question marks popped out of his head.
The author has something to say: Gu Bai:? ? ? ? What? ?
Si Yiming: proud.jpg
